_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the case-mismatch branch of the excel-activities/read-range-sheet-not-found playbook. Agent must chain: folders list-current-user → jobs list --state Faulted → jobs get → jobs logs (reveals actual sheets ['Sheet1', 'Data', 'Summary']) → workflow source. Compare configured 'data' (lowercase) vs actual 'Data' (capital), identify Use Excel File scope without COM-forcing properties → OpenXML provider → case-sensitive lookup.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0011111-2222-3333-4444-555566667777 --state Faulted --output json
